find_merchant_trust.title: Earn the Merchant's Trust
find_merchant_trust.description: Build a relationship with the merchant and complete their delivery task to gain their trust.
find_merchant_trust.start_dialogue: The merchant eyes you warily, but seems willing to give you a chance to prove yourself.

progress_dialogue.progression_met: The merchant seems to trust you more now.

find_merchant_trust.completion_dialogue: The merchant nods approvingly. 'You've proven yourself trustworthy. I'll remember this.'

merchants_secret.title: The Merchant's Secret
merchants_secret.description: Something is troubling the merchant. Gain their full confidence to find out what.
merchants_secret.start_dialogue: Now that you've proven yourself, the merchant seems like they want to confide something...
merchants_secret.completion_dialogue: The merchant finally opens up about the trouble they've been hiding.
